# Obesity & metabolic syndrome

::: {.callout-note}
## Chapter in preparation
This Part IV chapter is planned but not yet drafted. It will cover nutrition in over-nutrition — obesity and the metabolic syndrome: assessment, dietary management, weight-inclusive care, and when to escalate.

Earlier chapters point here for the clinical detail they defer — for now they handle it at
**recognise-and-refer** altitude, and the full management lands in this chapter.
:::
